about.main_title: 💡 What will change after working with us?
about.description: If you're suffering from marketing chaos, too many messages, and scattered tools... BeatApp combines all the steps of attracting, following up with, and converting customers into one system that works for you even when you're busy.
about.guarantee_text: We don't provide a ready-made system for everyone... but we build a customized system for you based on your project's nature. And if you feel within the first 7 days that it doesn't serve you as expected, we'll fix the path or stop the subscription... without any commitment.
